narration: Adolescence isn’t just about hormones; it’s a brain makeover.
visual_description: Hook visual: Adolescence isn’t just about hormones; it’s a brain makeover.

narration: During these years, your brain is pruning away extra connections, like trimming a tree.
visual_description: Context visual: During these years, your brain is pruning away extra connections, like trimming a tree.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: During these years, your brain is pruning away extra connections, like trimming a tree.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: During these years, your brain is pruning away extra connections, like trimming a tree.

narration: This process, known as synaptic pruning, boosts efficiency and speeds up thinking.
visual_description: Escalation visual: This process, known as synaptic pruning, boosts efficiency and speeds up thinking.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This process, known as synaptic pruning, boosts efficiency and speeds up thinking.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This process, known as synaptic pruning, boosts efficiency and speeds up thinking.

narration: Studies show that by late adolescence, the brain has cut away up to 50% of its connections.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show that by late adolescence, the brain has cut away up to 50% of its connections.

narration: It’s not just chaos; it’s a strategic upgrade for adulthood.
